data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: read_first gate — ticket-lib.sh (299 lines) and test-ticket-lib.sh (438 lines) read. Understood write_commit_event() structure: validates tracker, extracts metadata, stages temp file, acquires flock, atomic rename + git add + commit. Tests use _make_test_repo, _make_event_json helpers, assert.sh and git-fixtures.sh libs.
